name: Modification to Authorized Keys File
notes: This rule detects when /.ssh/authorized_keys file is modified. The attacker adds his Public Key to authorized_keys file, which as long as he owns the Private Key he can login to the system anytime without further authentication.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful File Modification
when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of authorized_keys
when the event matches File Directory (custom) contains any of /.ssh
TD_list: APPLY Modification to Authorized Keys File on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful File Modification
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of authorized_keys
AND when the event matches File Directory (custom) contains any of /.ssh
RED_list: Event name: Modification to Authorized Keys File
Event description: Detects when /.ssh/authorized_keys file is modified.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
